actionCalls.name: Get_Countries_From_Global_Value_Set_For_Address
actionCalls.label: Get Countries From Global Value Set For Address

assignments.name: Assign_to_Account_Record_from_Manual_Input
assignments.label: Assign to Account Record from Manual Input

assignments.label: Assign to Account Record from OS Places

assignments.name: Set_Delivery_Address_to_Filtered_Address
assignments.label: Set Delivery Address to Filtered Address

formulas.name: fml_AddressesAvailableText
formulas.expression: IF( {!var_NumberofAddressesReturned} == 1, "1 address found for " & {!var_EnteredPostcode}, TEXT({!var_NumberofAddressesReturned}) & " addresses found for " & {!var_EnteredPostcode})

value.stringValue: Search again,Enter address manually,Use this address
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT

variables.description: Return either Back or Next to parent flow
variables.name: var_output_navigation
